name: West African Groundnut Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the sweet potatoes until they are just tender.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large pot. Add garlic and ginger, cooking for 1 minute.
3. Stir in coriander, cayenne, onion, tomatoes, eggplant, and stock. Simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add zucchini and peppers; simmer for an additional 20 minutes.
5. Drain the sweet potatoes and mash them. Return to the pot.
6. Add tomato juice and peanut butter; stir well.
7. Continue cooking for 5 to 10 more minutes until flavors are well combined.
8. Serve over rice or millet, garnished with pineapple or banana slices.
